verifiedpermissions.identitysource.ident:
A structure that contains configuration information used when creating or updating a new identity source.

**Note**  
At this time, the only valid member of this structure is a Amazon Cognito user pool configuration.  
You must specify a `userPoolArn`, and optionally, a `ClientId`.

verifiedpermissions.identitysource.ident.Description: A structure that contains configuration information used when creating or updating an identity source that represents a connection to an Amazon Cognito user pool used as an identity provider for Verified Permissions.
